creator: fabio.comolli@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #96)

On my system this doesn't build with the devel/kBuild package currently available in 14.2-latest (kBuild-0.1.9998_15). I had to fetch devel/kBuild r3660 from ports to successfully build virtualbox-ose-70 (the new package shows up as kBuild-0.1.9998_16 once compiled).
